compiled_state.title: Administrative: correct SC5 verify command and create Phase 5/6 follow-on ticket
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: Two administrative actions (no source file changes): (1) Add epic ticket comment correcting SC5 verify: .claude/scripts/dso ticket comment c737-977d 'SC5 verify corrected to: grep -c WORKTREE_PATH.*ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT plugins/dso/skills/fix-bug/SKILL.md (old verify grep -n ORCHESTRATOR_ROOT already passed before implementation)'. (2) Create follow-on bug ticket: .claude/scripts/dso ticket create bug '[debug-everything] Diagnostic Mode Phase 5/6 dispatch uses isolation:worktree but lacks harvest/integration path' -d 'Phase 5 dispatches multi-agent batches with isolation:worktree. Phase 6 runs git diff from orchestrator CWD, missing worktree changes. Fix requires per-worktree-review-commit.md pattern. Explicitly deferred from epic c737-977d.' Then link to c737-977d. AC: both ticket operations complete. Both must succeed for task closure. testing_mode: GREEN (admin-only, no behavioral change)
